prompt: Close-up on textile craftsmanship: 'WEAVE' emerges from a rustic linen base, each letter a testament to detailed embroidery using a kaleidoscope of colorful threads, highlighting a handcrafted aesthetic.
prompt_refined: A close-up shot of the word 'WEAVE' meticulously embroidered onto a rustic, textured linen fabric base. Each letter is rendered with detailed embroidery, utilizing a kaleidoscope of vibrant, colorful threads, highlighting intricate handcrafted textile craftsmanship.
